Name: [MILESTONE] POC Kickoff
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Day 1 | Convert to Milestone after import

Name: POC environment provisioned (licenses/access)
Description: Owner: CE + Customer IT | Timing: Day 1-2 | Ensure GCA licenses assigned and dev environments accessible

Name: Opstree architect assigned & briefed
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Day 1 | Share customer context and POC scope

Name: POC kickoff meeting with customer engineering
Description: Owner: CE + Opstree | Timing: Day 2-3 | Agenda: introductions, GCA overview, pilot group selection, timeline

Name: POC success criteria sign-off doc shared & agreed
Description: Owner: CE + Customer | Timing: Day 3-5 | Attach signed doc to task. Capture: success metrics, pilot group size, exit criteria, decision timeline

Name: GCA plugin deployed to pilot group (10-20 devs)
Description: Owner: Opstree + Customer IT | Timing: Day 5-7 | IDE plugin installed and validated for pilot users

Name: Mid-POC check-in (blockers and feedback)
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Week 2 | Review adoption and surface blockers

Name: Adoption metrics from POC collected
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Week 3 | Pull from GCA admin console: WAU, acceptance rate, active users

Name: POC results documented
Description: Owner: CE + Opstree | Timing: Week 3-4 | Usage stats vs success criteria, wins, blockers resolved, recommendation

Name: Executive readout / go-forward recommendation
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Week 4-5 | Present results and recommendation to sponsor and economic buyer

Name: Commercial proposal submitted
Description: Owner: AE | Timing: Week 5 | CE to support with technical scope and licensing details

Name: Decision: Closed-Won / Closed-Lost
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Week 5-6 | Update Stage and Outcome fields and notify team

Name: [MILESTONE] POC Completion
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Week 4-6 | Convert to Milestone after import

Name: [MILESTONE] Kickoff Complete
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Day 5 | Convert to Milestone after import

Name: [MILESTONE] Plugin Deployed
Description: Owner: Opstree | Timing: Day 14 | Convert to Milestone after import

Name: [MILESTONE] 30-Day Adoption Report
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Day 30 | Convert to Milestone after import

Name: [MILESTONE] 60-Day Health Check
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Day 60 | Convert to Milestone after import

Name: [MILESTONE] Graduation to Steady-State
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Day 90 | Convert to Milestone after import

Name: Internal handoff (CE to Opstree to TAM)
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Day 1 | Brief Opstree and TAM on customer context, deal details, and 90-day plan

Name: Customer kickoff call
Description: Owner: CE + Opstree | Timing: Day 3 | Introductions, onboarding plan walkthrough, expectations setting

Name: Technical onboarding plan shared
Description: Owner: Opstree | Timing: Day 5 | Deliver written onboarding plan to customer IT and champion

Name: Admin console setup & license provisioning
Description: Owner: Opstree | Timing: Day 7 | Configure GCA admin console and assign licenses to pilot users

Name: Admin sessions delivered (IT/admin team training)
Description: Owner: Opstree | Timing: Day 7-14 | Train customer admins on GCA console management

Name: Enablement sessions conducted (dev team onboarding)
Description: Owner: Opstree | Timing: Day 14-30 | Developer onboarding sessions covering GCA features and best practices

Name: IDE plugin deployment plan agreed with IT
Description: Owner: Opstree + Customer IT | Timing: Day 7-10 | Document rollout approach and dependencies

Name: Pilot group rollout (10-20 devs)
Description: Owner: Opstree + Customer IT | Timing: Day 14 | Full plugin installation and validation for pilot cohort

Name: VPC-SC / proxy configuration (if needed)
Description: Owner: Opstree | Timing: Day 10-14 | Configure network routing for GCA in restricted environments

Name: Coding standards & prompt guidance shared
Description: Owner: Opstree | Timing: Day 14 | Share GCA usage guidelines and prompt engineering tips with dev team

Name: First adoption metrics collected
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Day 21 | Pull WAU and acceptance rate from GCA admin console

Name: Developer feedback session
Description: Owner: CE + Opstree | Timing: Day 21 | Structured feedback from pilot developers on blockers and wins

Name: Enablement workshop delivered
Description: Owner: Opstree | Timing: Day 28 | Hands-on workshop for full dev team

Name: 30-day adoption report
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Day 30 | Report on WAU adoption vs target; share with customer sponsor

Name: Broader rollout (full team)
Description: Owner: Opstree | Timing: Day 35-45 | Expand GCA access from pilot to full developer organisation

Name: 60-day health check
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Day 60 | Review adoption metrics and health with customer champion

Name: Blockers resolved (policy / proxy / UX)
Description: Owner: Opstree | Timing: Ongoing | Track and resolve any adoption blockers raised by developers

Name: WAU adoption >= 60% confirmed
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Day 75 | Validate adoption threshold met — green light for graduation

Name: First QBR scheduled
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Day 80 | Set QBR date with customer sponsor and confirm agenda

Name: Opstree ongoing scope agreed
Description: Owner: CE + Opstree | Timing: Day 85 | Define Opstree involvement for Steady-State phase

Name: Mark project Stage field to Steady-State
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Day 90 | Update Stage custom field on this project to Steady-State

Name: Monthly adoption metrics pull
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: 1st of each month | Recurring task — pull WAU from GCA admin console

Name: Champion check-in call
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Monthly | Recurring — 30-min sync with customer champion on adoption and asks

Name: Update Customer Health and WAU Adoption % fields
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Monthly | Recurring — update both custom fields based on latest metrics

Name: Watch for WAU drop greater than 10%
Description: Owner: Opstree | Timing: Weekly | Recurring — flag to CE if week-on-week adoption drops materially

Name: Pull usage data from GCA admin console (QBR prep)
Description: Owner: Opstree | Timing: 2 weeks before QBR | Export usage stats for QBR deck

Name: Draft QBR deck
Description: Owner: CE + Opstree | Timing: 1 week before QBR | Cover: usage stats vs targets; wins; roadmap; asks from customer

Name: QBR review call with sponsor / leadership
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Quarterly | Deliver QBR and capture all action items during call

Name: Capture & enter QBR action items in Asana
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Day of QBR | Create tasks in this project for every customer action item from QBR

Name: Expansion signal identified (new team or use case)
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: As identified | Log expansion opportunity and create pre-sales task in CE Pipeline

Name: Expansion discovery call
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: As identified | Qualify the expansion scope and ARR potential

Name: Commercial expansion discussion
Description: Owner: AE + CE | Timing: As identified | Hand off expansion opportunity to AE for commercial motion

Name: Renewal date logged in Next Key Date field
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Day of contract | Set Renewal Date custom field on this project

Name: 90-day pre-renewal health check
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: 90 days before renewal | Review health and flag any renewal risk early

Name: Renewal risk assessment — update Health field
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: 90 days before renewal | Set Customer Health field; escalate if Red

Name: Renewal confirmed / at-risk escalated
Description: Owner: CE + AE | Timing: Before renewal date | Confirm renewal or escalate risk to leadership
